name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.0700, stop A$10.7019, target A$14.1259 (1.50:1) — then trail it.
